label: Alibaba launches Wukong platform for orchestrating complex business tasks with agents
label_zh: 阿里巴巴推出 Wukong 平台 透過代理編排複雜業務任務

timeline.title: Alibaba Launches Wukong AI Platform to Orchestrate Complex Enterprise Workflows Using Autonomous Agents
timeline.title_zh: 阿里巴巴推出悟空 AI 平台，透過自主代理協調複雜企業工作流程
timeline.sub_title: The new platform, managed under the Alibaba Token Hub, enables multi-agent coordination within DingTalk and plans for global integrations, signaling a major pivot toward agentic business automation.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 該平台在阿里巴巴 Token Hub 下管理，可在釘釘內實現多代理協調，並計劃全球整合，標誌著朝向代理式業務自動化重大轉向。
timeline.summary:
Alibaba Group has officially introduced Wukong, an enterprise-grade, AI-native platform designed to coordinate and manage multiple AI agents for complex business workflows. Launched during an invitation-only beta period, Wukong represents a significant evolution in the company’s AI strategy, moving beyond simple chat interfaces to a system capable of executing autonomous tasks across various digital environments. The [ref:1, 3, 6, 9, 4] platform is designed to handle high-level operations such as document editing, spreadsheet synchronization, and comprehensive research by orchestrating specialized agents through a unified interface.

The technical foundation of Wukong marks a departure from traditional graphical user interfaces (GUI), utilizing a redesigned command-line interface (CLI) and open API layer. This [ref:9] architecture allows AI agents to bypass human-centric bottlenecks and perform direct system calls, potentially reducing the time required for complex processes like application development from weeks to hours. Currently [ref:6], Wukong is accessible as a standalone desktop application and is deeply embedded within DingTalk, Alibaba’s workplace collaboration tool that serves over 20 million corporate organizations.

Strategically, the platform is the first major product to emerge from the newly formed Alibaba Token Hub (ATH) business group, led personally by Alibaba Group CEO Eddie Wu. The ATH group consolidates the company’s core AI assets, including the Tongyi Laboratory and the Qwen AI assistant unit. This restructuring [ref:1, 8, 4] focuses on a "token-based" monetization model, where the revenue flywheel is driven by the high volume of tokens consumed by autonomous agents compared to traditional chatbots. By centralizing these efforts, Alibaba aims to streamline the development and delivery of AI "skills" across its entire ecosystem, including Taobao, Tmall, and Alipay.

The launch occurs against the backdrop of an "agentic AI" surge in China, largely sparked by the popularity of the open-source framework OpenClaw. Alibaba’s entry into [ref:6] this space intensifies competition with other domestic giants like Tencent and ByteDance, as well as global players like Nvidia. To address the inherent security risks of autonomous agents, Alibaba has equipped Wukong with enterprise-grade safeguards, including identity verification, granular access controls, and isolated sandbox environments to prevent the unauthorized execution of code or the spread of malware.

Looking ahead, Alibaba plans to expand Wukong's reach by integrating it with global messaging services such as Slack and Microsoft Teams, as well as domestic competitors like WeChat. The company also introduced [ref:2, 9] industry-specific "One-Person Team" solutions, tailored for sectors ranging from manufacturing and legal services to e-commerce and recruitment. These modular solutions [ref:9] are intended to empower individuals and small enterprises to scale their operations by deploying a fleet of AI agents to manage sophisticated, multi-step workflows.
timeline.summary_zh:
阿里巴巴集團正式推出了悟空 (Wukong)，這是一個企業級、AI 原生的平台，旨在協調和管理用於複雜業務流程的多個 AI 代理。悟空在邀請制的 beta 測試期間推出，代表了該公司 AI 策略的重大演進，從簡單的聊天介面轉向一個能夠在各種數位環境中執行自主任務的系統。該平台旨在透過統一介面協調專用代理，處理高級操作，例如文件編輯、試算表同步和全面研究。

悟空的技術基礎標誌著與傳統圖形使用者介面 (GUI) 的區別，採用了重新設計的命令列介面 (CLI) 和開放 API 層。這種架構允許 AI 代理繞過以人為中心的瓶頸，執行直接的系統呼叫，可能將複雜流程（如應用程式開發）所需的時間從數週縮短至數小時。目前，悟空可作為獨立的桌面應用程式使用，並深度整合於釘釘內，阿里巴巴的工作協作工具，服務超過 2000 萬家企業組織。

在策略上，該平台是新成立的阿里巴巴 Token Hub (ATH) 業務集團推出的首個主要產品，該集團由阿里巴巴集團 CEO 吳泳銘親自領導。ATH 集團整合了該公司的核心 AI 資產，包括統一視覺實驗室和通義千問 AI 助理單元。這次重組側重於「代幣化」的貨幣化模式，其中收入飛輪是由自主代理比傳統聊天機器人消耗的大量代幣所驅動。透過集中這些努力，阿里巴巴旨在簡化整個生態系統的 AI「技能」的開發和交付，包括淘寶、天貓和支付寶。

這項發布正值中國「代理式 AI」浪潮的背景下，這波浪潮很大程度上是由開源框架 OpenClaw 的流行所引發。阿里巴巴進入這一領域，加劇了與騰訊、字節跳動等國內巨頭以及輝達等全球參與者的競爭。為了解決自主代理固有的安全風險，阿里巴巴為悟空配備了企業級安全措施，包括身份驗證、細粒度存取控制和隔離的沙箱環境，以防止未經授權的程式碼執行或惡意軟體的傳播。

展望未來，阿里巴巴計劃透過將悟空整合到 Slack 和 Microsoft Teams 等全球通訊服務以及微信等國內競爭對手，來擴展悟空的影響範圍。該公司還推出了行業特定的「一人團隊」解決方案，針對製造、法律服務、電子商務和招聘等行業。這些模組化解決方案旨在使個人和小企業能夠透過部署一群 AI 代理來管理複雜的多步驟工作流程，從而擴大其營運規模。
